ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the data (e.g., stock prices, trading volumes) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data (e.g., returns, drawdowns) */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "size_mb" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source's website */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last date the source was checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the frequency is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the frequency was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the year was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the return belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "return_value" REAL /* Return value */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the given date */,
  "is_adjusted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the return value is adjusted for splits, dividends, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
